events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Former Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Eighty-six trips around the sun for the legendary Ringo Starr! The man who kept the beat for the biggest band in history.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May was born in Hampton, London, in 1947, and celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! Still rocking the Red Special like no one else.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, born in Dartford in 1943, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young for Sir Mick Jagger! The energy, the moves, the voice – still an undisputed rock icon.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) debuted on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed...
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed everything. Remember where you were when 'Video Killed The Radio Star' first aired?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on Max Yasgur's farm in upstate New York on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, is still deeply missed. His music and legacy are eternal.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today, born in Akron, Ohio, in 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Seventy-five years of pure rock 'n' roll attitude! Happy birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born in Manchester in 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of 'biblical' tunes and iconic swagger. Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to crank up those iconic theme tunes – what's your favourite 007 track?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder, singer, and songwriter John Lennon would have celebrated his 86th birthday today, born in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: Imagine The Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to inspire.
